caption:
Designed, on-brand email campaigns in literally one prompt 🤯 Possibilities are endless here. 

Hey, I’m Max. 8 years ago I got into ecommerce through running my own store.

What I loved most was the marketing, direct response, and seeing numbers go up on a screen...

That obsession led me to email, and I’ve been living and breathing it for the past 5 years.

I went in-house first. Head email marketer for multiple 8-figure brands at the same time until I built my agency, Well Copy.

We’ve now worked with 200+ ecommerce brands and currently manage email, sms, and subscription programs for 100+ actively...

We help brands scale from 7 to 9 figures, and have generated $200M+ from email in the process.

I’m 23 and built this all while in college and graduating in May 2025. 

This is all I do. All I think about. And I’m just getting started.

I post about email, SMS, and subscription brand growth... the strategies the fastest-growing brands are actually using TODAY.

If that’s what you’re here for, follow along 🤝

DM me “EMAILZ” to get free resources or explore working together (you can also hit the link in my bio).

Follow @wellcopymax for more.
author: Max Sturtevant
transcript: New Claude AI design update is insane. Look at what I was able to generate off of literally just one prompt in five minutes of work. Genuinely, designers and marketers might be cooked. In one prompt, I created this email, this email, and this email. Three variations of the same email. Crazy part is, is you can literally like draw on this and leave your comments and have it make updates for you directly here in chat. You can leave comments, whatever you wanna do, and it'll make tweaks for you. AI email design sucked before this, but now it's actually good. Here's like the exact system and prompts that I used. If you have the pro version of Claude, you can go to design right here. And you just wanna create a new project, high fidelity right here, and just name it like test. Literally, this is all that I used. I gave it a link to a Figma file with prior email designs, and I was like, hey, here's this brand, I want you to create some unique emails for me. And then it asked me a couple questions, so I was like, yep, so here are the questions, and then it literally just generated this. I'm gonna be messing around and finding the best sorts of prompts and the best system for this, so make sure that you follow along. But no, I don't think that designers are cooked. Designers are just gonna be able to use this as a tool to be able to produce content on a much wider scale.
title: Claude AI Generates On-Brand Emails in One Prompt
one_liner: Claude's new design feature creates full email campaign variations from a single prompt in minutes.
key_points: Use Claude Pro's design mode to generate high-fidelity email variations from one prompt linked to a Figma file
You can annotate directly in the chat to request tweaks and edits on the generated designs
AI email design has improved dramatically — output is now brand-consistent and production-ready
Designers won't be replaced; they'll use this to produce at much higher volume and speed
